{{CargoOrgan
|name=Golden Wings
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10888
|idx=99
|description="Whales said that the model should have wings, so here we have wings! They said the wings should be awesome, so the devs added this super dazzling effect!"
—The Psychology of PTW
|skill=
|hp=2900
|def=227
|atk=195
|rush=358
|gene1=Wind DMG +120
|gene2=Wind RES +120
|gene3=Wind DMG +120
|gene4=Each round, {race} RUSH +80
|gene5=Ignore Wind RES +120
|gene6=RUSH Ignore DEF +4%
|gene7=RUSH Ignore DEF +4% (Awakened)
|}}
